title: New Release: Bulk Upload Files to Your Board in Seconds 📁🚀

posts.author: Benx (ben)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve seen many users ask:

“How can I quickly upload lots of files to monday.com without doing it one-by-one?”

Whether you’re managing hundreds of invoices, design assets, contracts, or scanned documents, the answer is finally here: Bulk File Uploader is live on the marketplace!

What you can do with Bulk File Uploader:

  • Drag and drop dozens—or hundreds—of files at once
  • Match files to existing items using Item ID, text columns, or number columns
  • Manage files before uploading — filter, search, delete, and preview oversized files
  • Create new items for each file with zero manual input
  • Built-in smart matching and adaptive upload for smooth performance
  • Fully integrated into monday.com — no external tools required

Use case example:
Let’s say you have 100 PDF invoices named like INV-2048.pdf, INV-2049.pdf… and your monday board has a column called “Invoice ID.”
With Bulk File Uploader, just:

  1. Select the Files column
  2. Choose “Match by text column: Invoice ID”
  3. Drop all your files in
  4. Done. All files are attached to the right items — instantly!

Who’s it for?

  • Marketing teams uploading campaign media
  • Finance uploading monthly reports
  • Product & ops attaching specs or scanned files
  • Everyone tired of uploading files one at a time!

Save hours. Avoid mistakes. Upload like a pro.

Ready to try it?

Install Bulk File Uploader on your monday.com account

Got questions or feedback? Drop a comment below — we’d love to hear from you!
